Verified with the new hook test module plus focused failure-mode coverage.","files_changed":["/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useWaveformData.ts","/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useWaveformData.test.tsx"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useWaveformData.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/WaveformOverlay.test.tsx"]},{"task_id":"T2","status":"done","executor_notes":"Added WaveformOverlay as a memoized mirrored SVG path overlay with absolute positioning, pointer-events disabled, preserveAspectRatio=\"none\", and semi-transparent currentColor fill. Verified with a dedicated component test module that checks the non-interactive overlay structure.","files_changed":["/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/WaveformOverlay.tsx","/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/WaveformOverlay.test.tsx"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useWaveformData.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/WaveformOverlay.test.tsx"]}],"sense_check_acknowledgments":[{"sense_check_id":"SC1","executor_note":"Covered undefined src, failed fetch, decode rejection, and zero-length buffers in useWaveformData.test.tsx; each path settles to { waveform: null, loading: false } without throwing."},{"sense_check_id":"SC2","executor_note":"WaveformOverlay renders inside an absolute inset-0 wrapper with pointer-events-none and opacity-25, and its SVG path string is memoized with useMemo so it can sit behind later clip content without intercepting interaction."}]}

items.text: Inspect timeline editor and existing audio decode patterns relevant to T1/T2
Implement useWaveformData hook and WaveformOverlay component
Verify the new files compile cleanly and checkpoint batch progress
Inspect ClipAction and related tests to wire the existing waveform pieces into the timeline clip UI
Implement T3 in ClipAction with prop comparison updates and overlay layering
Run the relevant full test modules and checkpoint batch 2 status

item.text: I’m checking the timeline render path and the detach-audio flow first so T4 lands in the right layer and the volume gating matches the existing editor behavior.

I’ve confirmed the detach-audio path does mute the visual clip by setting `volume: 0`, so the gating for `audioSrc` has to happen in `TimelineEditor`, not inside `ClipAction`. Next I’m checking the `getActionRender` call sites and test coverage so I can thread clip width through without widening the change more than necessary.

The width callback doesn’t live in `types/timeline-canvas.ts`; it’s defined directly on `TimelineCanvasProps`, so I’m extending it there and adding a pure eligibility helper in `TimelineEditor` to keep the volume/MIME logic testable, including the detach-audio case.

I’ve threaded the width through `TimelineCanvas` and added a pure waveform-source resolver in `TimelineEditor` so the gating rules are unit-testable. I’m running the full relevant timeline and waveform test modules now to catch any contract mismatch before I checkpoint batch 3.
